query:
SELECT u.id as userId, u.email, u.name, t.id as tenantId, t.name as tenantName, t.subscriptionTier, t.subscriptionStatus, t.stripeSubscriptionId, t.stripeCustomerId, t.onboardingCompleted 
FROM users u 
JOIN tenants t ON u.tenantId = t.id 
WHERE u.email LIKE '%coreydenzel%' OR u.name LIKE '%coreydenzel%' OR u.email LIKE '%corey%denzel%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT u.id as userId, u.email, u.name, t.id as tenantId, t.name as tenantName, t.subscriptionTier, t.subscriptionStatus, t.stripeSubscriptionId, t.stripeCustomerId, t.onboardingCompleted 
FROM users u 
JOIN tenants t ON u.tenantId = t.id 
WHERE u.email LIKE '%coreydenzel%' OR u.name LIKE '%coreydenzel%' OR u.email LIKE '%corey%denzel%';
